Annual product launch for our new line of smart home devices.

3-hour event at a downtown venue, starting 6pm with cocktails and networking.
CEO keynote at 7pm (about 45 minutes). Live product demos at three breakout
stations from 7:45 until 9pm. Wind-down and mingling until close.

Deliverable: a 2-minute highlight reel for social.

Must capture:
- the CEO on stage, both a clean wide and a tight close-up
- the product itself in clear, well-lit focus
- audience reactions during the demos (laughter, surprise, leaning in)
- our sponsor logos on the backdrop and on the demo stations
- at least one shot of an attendee using the product in hand

Nice to have:
- vibey b-roll of the venue exterior at golden hour
- candid hallway conversations
- the bartender pouring a signature cocktail

Themes: innovation, community, premium feel.
